title: API latency spike on /checkout
summary: p99 latency on POST /checkout climbed to 2.45s while CPU on api-server-0 hit 92%. Investigation traces the spike to a saturated worker pool.
rootCause: api-server-0 CPU saturation (92%) caused queueing on /checkout requests, pushing p99 latency to 2.45s.
recommendation: Scale api-server replicas from 1 to 3, or set a CPU autoscaler with target 70%.
